author: {'name': 'Dayounginnn', 'author_id': '1523794942'}
text: I genuinely don’t understand how this app has the ratings it does. I would put a 0 star if there was an option. Sherlock AI is frustrating to use from start to finish. The responses are often inaccurate, repetitive, or completely miss the point of what you’re asking. It feels like the AI guesses more than it actually understands. The app itself is clunky, slow, and filled with unnecessary limitations. Features that should be basic are locked behind a paywall, and even then the experience doesn’t improve much. Crashes, bugs, and inconsistent performance make it feel unfinished. There are so many better AI apps available that are faster, smarter, and actually useful. Sherlock AI feels like a cheap imitation that’s more interested in getting your money than providing a quality product. I regret downloading it and definitely wouldn’t recommend it to anyone.
title: Terrible app

helpfulness_vote_information: 14 out of 18 customers found this review helpful
text: It would be helpful if you allowed at least one or two free credits so users can check the analyzed results and build confidence that the app is providing accurate insights. Without giving any opportunity to try the analysis first, asking users to pay right away makes it difficult to trust the results. A small trial or a couple of free chances would help users understand the value of the app and decide whether it’s worth paying for. This would greatly improve the overall user experience and trust in the platform.
